[Page 2]
Highlights of the Week
Global steel prices are experiencing some stability as a slowdown in production has led it to regain the demand-supply balance in many regions. In
the ship recycling market, a prolonged period of dull buying activity has created an appetite among the recyclers to secure tonnage for their emptying
yards, however, with the ongoing issues such as depleting forex reserves, LC restrictions and slowdown in demand, they are not able to offer
attractive price levels which can spur activity in the recycling sector. With every geopolitical decision

[Page 2]
Highlights of the Week
Global steel prices are experiencing some stability as a slowdown in production has led it to regain the demand-supply balance in many regions. In
the ship recycling market, a prolonged period of dull buying activity has created an appetite among the recyclers to secure tonnage for their emptying
yards, however, with the ongoing issues such as depleting forex reserves, LC restrictions and slowdown in demand, they are not able to offer
attractive price levels which can spur activity in the recycling sector.
